message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false

class MediumDungeon << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  +newBokoblin() : Bokoblin
  +newMoblin() : Moblin
}

class EasyDungeon << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  +newBokoblin() : Bokoblin
  +newMoblin() : Moblin
}

class Encounter << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  -enemies : [Monster]
  -dungeon : Dungeon
  +announceEnemies()
  +moveEnemies()
}

class BlueBokoblin << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  +announce()
  +move()
  +bludgeon()
  +defend()
}

class BlueMoblin << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  +announce()
  +move()
  +stab()
  +kick()
}

class NormalBokoblin << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  +announce()
  +move()
  +bludgeon()
  +defend()
}

class NormalMoblin << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  +announce()
  +move()
  +stab()
  +kick()
}

interface Dungeon << (I,#b9b0e6) >> {
  {abstract} +newBokoblin() : Bokoblin
  {abstract} +newMoblin() : Moblin
}

interface Bokoblin << (I,#b9b0e6) >> {
  {abstract} +bludgeon()
  {abstract} +defend()
}

interface Moblin << (I,#b9b0e6) >> {
  {abstract} +stab()
  {abstract} +kick()
}

interface Monster << (I,#b9b0e6) >> {
  {abstract} +announce()
  {abstract} +move()
}

' Factory implementations
MediumDungeon ..|> Dungeon
EasyDungeon ..|> Dungeon

' Products implement interfaces
BlueBokoblin ..|> Bokoblin
NormalBokoblin ..|> Bokoblin

BlueMoblin ..|> Moblin
NormalMoblin ..|> Moblin

Bokoblin ..|> Monster
Moblin ..|> Monster

' Dependencies from factories to concrete products
MediumDungeon ..> BlueBokoblin
MediumDungeon ..> BlueMoblin
MediumDungeon ..> NormalBokoblin

EasyDungeon ..> NormalBokoblin
EasyDungeon ..> NormalMoblin

' Dungeon creates abstract products
Dungeon ..> Bokoblin
Dungeon ..> Moblin

' Encounter aggregates/uses
Encounter o-- Dungeon
Encounter o-- Monster

@enduml
```
